overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The character traverses an elevated walkway with purple neon lighting, descends to street level with wet reflective roads and passing vehicles, and finally enters a narrow teal-lit alley where two individuals sit at a table.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with purple neon lighting

events.description: camera overtakes the two female pedestrians walking ahead on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated neon-lit walkway following then passing two female pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman with MILITECH back tattoo in red skirt walking ahead then being passed by camera
woman in white crop top and red boots walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: Building wall with intense purple neon strip lighting and reflective surfaces
Tall illuminated rectangular pillar displaying colorful advertisements
Transparent glass barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
Tall skyscrapers covered in bright digital billboards and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway bathed in purple neon light. The camera follows two distinctively dressed women before overtaking them, revealing glass railings and digital advertisement pillars along the path. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with massive neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with stairs descending from elevated walkway to road level

events.description: leaving elevated walkway and beginning descent down concrete stairs to street level
red sports car drives past on the wet street below the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking down wide concrete stairs from the elevated walkway to the street level

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the wet asphalt road with neon reflections
man in dark clothing sitting on the stairs using a handheld device

entered.detail: Wide concrete staircase with metal edges descending to street level
Asphalt road with wet reflective surface showing neon light reflections
Yellow metal railings separating the pedestrian stairs from the vehicle road
Tall modern street light illuminating the intersection area

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sheltered walkway to an open street corner, descending a wide concrete staircase. A red sports car passes by on the wet road below, its taillights reflecting off the damp asphalt. The environment shifts from enclosed purple neon to open street lighting with traffic barriers lining the descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city sidewalk with neon storefronts and street traffic

events.description: black sedan drives past on the wet street alongside the sidewalk
camera turns right toward the entrance of a narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and street traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the wet road with glowing taillights
pedestrian in blue jacket and red bag walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: Buildings with bright neon signs and glowing advertisements at street level
Black and yellow striped posts separating sidewalk from the road
Massive illuminated digital billboards covering the facades of towering skyscrapers
Dark narrow opening between buildings leading to a service alley

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown sidewalk, the camera passes black and yellow bollards lining the wet street where vehicles drive by. Neon storefronts glow on the right while massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards tower ahead. The segment ends with a turn toward a narrow alley entrance visible between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with teal neon lighting and dumpsters

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with teal neon lighting and high concrete walls
approaching two seated individuals at a small table in the alley dead end

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow alleyway approaching two people seated at a table against the wall

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting in red plastic chairs at a small table against the alley wall

entered.detail: Tall smooth concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow corridor
Bright cyan-colored neon tubes running horizontally along the building facade
Large green industrial dumpster with trash bags piled beside it
Illuminated vending machine with colorful display screen
Small metal table with two red plastic chairs positioned against the wall
Large glowing red circular sign at the dead end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow enclosed alleyway illuminated by teal neon strips. The camera passes a green dumpster and vending machine along the concrete walls, approaching two individuals seated at a small table near a glowing red sign at the alley's dead end. The atmosphere shifts from open urban bustle to intimate sheltered space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant elevated walkway down into the intimate, neon-lit depths of a city alley. It begins on a pedestrian path bathed in purple neon, gliding past two women and digital advertisement pillars with massive skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera descends a wide concrete staircase, the environment shifts from the sheltered walkway to an open street corner where a red sports car reflects off the wet asphalt. The scene then expands along a downtown sidewalk lined with black and yellow bollards and glowing storefronts before turning away from the urban bustle toward a narrow gap between buildings. Finally, the camera moves into an enclosed alleyway illuminated by teal neon strips, passing a green dumpster and vending machine to reach two individuals seated at a table beneath a glowing red sign.
